  try {
    if (window.__mintlifyInitialSidebarScrollDone) return;
    window.__mintlifyInitialSidebarScrollDone = true;

    var path = (window.location.pathname || '/').split('#')[0].split('?')[0];
    if (path.endsWith('/index')) path = path.slice(0, -6);
    else if (path === 'index') path = '';

    var candidates = [];
    if (path) candidates.push(path);
    if (path.startsWith('/')) candidates.push(path.slice(1));
    else candidates.push('/' + path);

    var item = null;
    for (var i = 0; i < candidates.length && !item; i++) {
      var matches = document.querySelectorAll('[id="' + candidates[i].replace(/"/g, '\\"') + '"]');
      for (var j = 0; j < matches.length; j++) {
        if (matches[j].closest('#sidebar, #sidebar-content')) {
          item = matches[j];
          break;
        }
      }
    }
    if (!item) return;

    var parent = item.parentElement;
    while (parent) {
      var style = getComputedStyle(parent);
      if (style.overflowY === 'auto' || style.overflowY === 'scroll') break;
      parent = parent.parentElement;
    }
    if (!parent) return;

    var parentRect = parent.getBoundingClientRect();
    var itemRect = item.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (itemRect.top >= parentRect.top && itemRect.bottom <= parentRect.bottom) return;

    var itemTopRelative = itemRect.top - parentRect.top + parent.scrollTop;
    parent.scrollTop = itemTopRelative - parentRect.height / 2 + itemRect.height / 2;
  } catch (e) {}
})();</script></div></div></div></div></nav><script mb-14" data-page-title="Manage Orders" data-page-href="/trading/manage-orders" id="content"><span data-as="p">After submitting an order, use authenticated account reads to check its current
state, reconcile open orders and resulting trades, and cancel liquidity you no
longer want resting on the book.</span>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="fetch-an-order"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#fetch-an-order" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Fetch an Order</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Look up a single order by its ID. Use this to check the current status of an
order you already know about, rather than scanning the full list of open
orders.</span>

class="line"><span>message = &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt; + &quot;GET&quot; + &quot;/data/order/$ORDER_ID&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>clob_l2_signature = urlsafeBase64WithPadding(</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  HMAC-SHA256(base64Decode(&lt;clob_api_secret&gt;), message)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span></code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" <span data-as="p">See <a class="link" href="/concepts/order-lifecycle#order-statuses">Order Statuses</a> to interpret the
returned <code>status</code>.</span>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="list-open-orders"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#list-open-orders" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">List Open Orders</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Retrieve every resting order on the account, optionally narrowed to one token,
one market, or a specific order ID. Use this to reconcile local state with
what’s actually live on the book.</span>

class="line"><span>message = &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt; + &quot;GET&quot; + &quot;/data/orders&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>clob_l2_signature = urlsafeBase64WithPadding(</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  HMAC-SHA256(base64Decode(&lt;clob_api_secret&gt;), message)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span></code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" <span data-as="p">See <a class="link" href="/concepts/order-lifecycle#order-statuses">Order Statuses</a> to interpret each
order’s <code>status</code>.</span>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="list-account-trades"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#list-account-trades" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">List Account Trades</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Retrieve executed fills for the account, as opposed to orders that are still
resting on the book. Use this to reconstruct fill history, compute realized
position size, or audit what actually matched.</span>

&quot;https://clob.polymarket.com/data/trades?market=</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">$CONDITION_ID</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_ADDRESS: &lt;signer_address&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_API_KEY: &lt;clob_api_key&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_PASSPHRASE: &lt;clob_api_passphrase&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_SIGNATURE: &lt;clob_l2_signature&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_TIMESTAMP: &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;&quot;</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div><span data-as="p">where <code>&lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;</code> is a Unix timestamp and

class="line"><span>message = &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt; + &quot;GET&quot; + &quot;/data/trades&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>clob_l2_signature = urlsafeBase64WithPadding(</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  HMAC-SHA256(base64Decode(&lt;clob_api_secret&gt;), message)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span></code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" <h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="list-builder-trades"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#list-builder-trades" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">List Builder Trades</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Retrieve matched trades attributed to a builder code across the accounts your
application serves. Use this instead of an account trade read when you need to
reconcile fills or measure activity for the builder integration as a whole.
Orders do not appear here until they match.</span>

next page. The terminal cursor is <code>LTE=</code>.</span></div></div></div>
<span data-as="p">See <a class="link" href="/programs/builders/overview">Builder Programs</a> to learn how attribution
works.</span>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="cancel-orders"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#cancel-orders" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Cancel Orders</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Cancel only as broadly as needed. Start with known order IDs, use a market or
token filter when withdrawing a set of quotes, and reserve account-wide
cancellation for exceptional situations. Cancellation remains available while
the exchange is in cancel-only mode, when new orders are rejected. For a
partially filled order, cancellation removes only its unfilled remainder.</span>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="cancel-orders-by-id"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#cancel-orders-by-id" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Cancel Orders by ID</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Cancel one order when you know its ID. To cancel a known set of orders in one
request, submit a batch of up to 3,000 IDs. Duplicate IDs in the batch are
ignored.</span>

[&amp;&gt;:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:pt-0!" data-component-part="tab-content"><span data-as="p">Call <code>cancelOrder()</code> on a <code>SecureClient</code> to cancel one order:</span><div <span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_PASSPHRASE: &lt;clob_api_passphrase&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_SIGNATURE: &lt;clob_l2_signature&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_TIMESTAMP: &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  --data</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &#x27;{&quot;orderID&quot;:&quot;&#x27;&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">$ORDER_ID</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">&quot;&#x27;&quot;}&#x27;</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div><span data-as="p">where <code>&lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;</code> is a Unix timestamp and

<code>not_canceled</code>.</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="cancel-market-orders"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#cancel-market-orders" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Cancel Market Orders</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Cancel by token to withdraw orders for one outcome, or by market to withdraw
orders for every outcome in the condition. At least one filter is required.</span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_TIMESTAMP: &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  --data</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &#x27;{&quot;asset_id&quot;:&quot;&#x27;&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">$TOKEN_ID</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">&quot;&#x27;&quot;}&#x27;</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div><span data-as="p">where <code>&lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;</code> is a Unix timestamp and

<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="cancel-all-orders"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#cancel-all-orders" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Cancel All Orders</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Use account-wide cancellation when you need to remove every resting order,
such as during an emergency shutdown.</span>
<div role="note" aria-label="Warning" class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&amp;_[data-component-part=&#x27;callout-icon&#x27;]]:mt-px" data-callout-type="warning"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300"><path d="M 9 6.75 v 1.5 m 0 3 h 0.0075 m -5.2035 3 h 10.392 c 1.155 0 1.8765 -1.2503 1.299 -2.25 L 10.299 3 c -0.5775 -0.9997 -2.0205 -0.9997 -2.598 0 L 2.505 12 c -0.5775 0.9997 0.144 2.25 1.299 2.25 z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:text-current! [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:text-current! text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">This action cancels every open order associated with the authenticated CLOB
API credentials.</span></div></div>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_ADDRESS: &lt;signer_address&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_API_KEY: &lt;clob_api_key&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_PASSPHRASE: &lt;clob_api_passphrase&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_SIGNATURE: &lt;clob_l2_signature&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_TIMESTAMP: &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;&quot;</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div><span data-as="p">where <code>&lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;</code> is a Unix timestamp and
<code>&lt;clob_l2_signature&gt;</code> is generated without a request body:</span><div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 class="line"><span>message = &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt; + &quot;DELETE&quot; + &quot;/cancel-all&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>clob_l2_signature = urlsafeBase64WithPadding(</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  HMAC-SHA256(base64Decode(&lt;clob_api_secret&gt;), message)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span></code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div><span data-as="p">The request returns <code>200 OK</code> with a <a href="#cancellation-results" class="link">cancellation
result</a> containing <code>canceled</code> and
<code>not_canceled</code>.</span></div></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="cancellation-results"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#cancellation-results" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Cancellation Results</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">A cancellation can succeed for only some of the requested orders. Reconcile the
result before retrying: it identifies the orders that were canceled and gives a
reason for each order that could not be canceled.</span>

<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="order-heartbeats"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#order-heartbeats" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Order Heartbeats</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Use order heartbeats to cancel resting orders automatically if your trading
process stops responding. Once the first heartbeat is accepted, the CLOB
expects the account to keep sending them; if a valid heartbeat is not received
within 10 seconds, all open orders owned by those CLOB API credentials are
canceled. The cancellation check runs every five seconds, so cancellation may
occur up to five seconds after the timeout.</span>
<div class="tabs tabs tab-container"><ul role="tablist" class="not-prose mb-6 pb-[1px] flex-none min-w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 gap-x-6 flex dark:border-gray-200/10" <span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_SIGNATURE: &lt;clob_l2_signature&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_TIMESTAMP: &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  --data</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &#x27;{&quot;heartbeat_id&quot;:&quot;&lt;heartbeat_id&gt;&quot;}&#x27;</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div><span data-as="p">Create a fresh <code>&lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;</code> and <code>&lt;clob_l2_signature&gt;</code> for this
request, replacing <code>body</code> in the signing calculation above with the exact
serialized body containing the latest ID.</span><span data-as="p">If the ID is invalid or expired, the CLOB responds with <code>400 Bad Request</code>
and supplies the expected ID. <h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="check-closed-only-mode"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#check-closed-only-mode" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Check Closed-Only Mode</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Closed-only mode is an account-level circuit breaker for a market. When it’s
on, the account can only place orders that reduce an existing position, not
new opening orders. Check this before placing an order if you want to fail
fast instead of waiting for a rejection.</span>

positions; new position-opening orders are rejected.</span></div></div></div>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="check-order-scoring"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#check-order-scoring" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Check Order Scoring</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">An order scores when it is live on a market with <a class="link" href="/programs/liquidity-rewards">liquidity
rewards</a> and meets the market’s minimum qualifying
size, maximum qualifying spread, and required live duration. Because
eligibility changes as the order book moves, treat the result as a point-in-time
check.</span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_TIMESTAMP: &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;&quot;</span></span>

<code>&lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;</code> and generate <code>&lt;clob_l2_signature&gt;</code> without a
request body. class="line"><span>message = &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt; + &quot;GET&quot; + &quot;/order-scoring&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>clob_l2_signature = urlsafeBase64WithPadding(</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  HMAC-SHA256(base64Decode(&lt;clob_api_secret&gt;), message)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span></code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" Maximum 1000 orders per request.\\nDuplicate order IDs in the request are automatically ignored.\\nWorks even in cancel-only mode.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml delete /orders\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/cancel-multiple-orders\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Cancel all orders\",\"description\":\"Cancels all open orders for the authenticated user. Works even in cancel-only mode.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml delete /cancel-all\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/cancel-all-orders\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Cancel orders for a market\",\"description\":\"Cancels all open orders for the authenticated user in a specific market (condition) and asset.\\nWorks even in cancel-only mode.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml delete /cancel-market-orders\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/cancel-orders-for-a-market\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get order scoring status\",\"description\":\"Checks if a specific order is currently scoring for rewards.\\n\\nAn order is considered \\\"scoring\\\" if it meets all the criteria for earning maker rewards:\\n- The order is live on a rewards-eligible market\\n- The order meets the minimum size requirements\\n- The order is within the valid spread range\\n- The order has been live for the required duration\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /order-scoring\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/get-order-scoring-status\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Send heartbeat\",\"description\":\"Sends a heartbeat signal to maintain active session status.\\nIf heartbeats are not sent regularly, all open orders for the user will be automatically canceled.\\nThis is useful for automated trading systems that need to ensure orders are canceled\\nif the system becomes unresponsive.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml post /heartbeats\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/send-heartbeat\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Trades\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get trades\",\"description\":\"Retrieves trades for the authenticated user. Returns paginated results.\\nRequires readonly or level 2 API key authentication.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /data/trades\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/get-trades\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get builder trades\",\"description\":\"Retrieves trades attributed to a builder code.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /builder/trades\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/get-builder-trades\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Rebates\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get current rebated fees for a maker\",\"description\":\"Returns the current rebated fees for a maker address on a given date.\\n\\nEach entry includes the condition ID, asset address, and the USDC amount rebated.\\n\\nThis endpoint does not require authentication.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rebates/current\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rebates/get-current-rebated-fees-for-a-maker\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Rewards\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get current active rewards configurations\",\"description\":\"Returns all current active rewards configurations grouped by market.\\n\\nWhen `sponsored=true`, returns sponsored reward configurations instead.\\n\\nResults are paginated (500 items per page). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/markets/current\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-current-active-rewards-configurations\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get raw rewards for a specific market\",\"description\":\"Returns an array of present and future rewards configured on a market.\\n\\nWhen `sponsored=true`, sponsored daily rates are folded into each config's\\n`rate_per_day` .\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/markets/{condition_id}\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-raw-rewards-for-a-specific-market\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get multiple markets with rewards\",\"description\":\"Returns a list of active markets with their reward configurations.\\nSupports text search, tag filtering, numeric filters, and sorting.\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page by default). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/markets/multi\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-multiple-markets-with-rewards\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get earnings for user by date\",\"description\":\"Returns an array of user earnings per market for a provided day.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/user\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-earnings-for-user-by-date\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get total earnings for user by date\",\"description\":\"Returns the summed total rewards earnings for a user on a provided day,\\ngrouped by asset address.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/user/total\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-total-earnings-for-user-by-date\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get reward percentages for user\",\"description\":\"Returns the real-time percentages of rewards that a user is earning per market.\\n\\nThe response is a map of condition_id to the percentage of total rewards\\nthe user is currently earning in that market.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/user/percentages\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-reward-percentages-for-user\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get user earnings and markets configuration\",\"description\":\"Returns an array of current rewards including user earnings and live percentages\\nper market for a provided day.\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page by default, max 500). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\\nOptional features:\\n- Search by question/description using the `q` parameter\\n- Filter by tag slugs using `tag_slug` parameter (multiple values are OR'ed)\\n- Filter by favorite markets using `favorite_markets=true`\\n- Sort by various fields using `order_by` and `position` parameters\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get request to the Relayer. Authenticated using Builder API Keys or Relayer API Keys.\\n\\nReturns immediately with the `transactionID` and a `state` of `STATE_NEW`. The onchain transaction hash is **not** included in this response — poll `GET /transaction` with the returned `transactionID` to retrieve the `transactionHash` once the transaction has been broadcast.\\n\\n**Builder API Key auth headers:**\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_API_KEY`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_TIMESTAMP`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_PASSPHRASE`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_SIGNATURE`\\n\\n**Relayer API Key auth headers:**\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY`\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS`\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml post /submit\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/submit-a-transaction\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get a transaction by ID\",\"description\":\"Gets a transaction submitted to the Relayer. Takes in a required transaction ID as a query parameter.\\n\\nPoll this endpoint with the `transactionID` returned from `POST /submit` to retrieve the onchain `transactionHash` once the transaction has been broadcast.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /transaction\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-a-transaction-by-id\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get recent transactions for a user\",\"description\":\"Gets the most recent transactions submitted to the Relayer, owned by a specific user. Authenticated using Builder API Keys or Relayer API Keys.\\n\\n**Builder API Key auth headers:**\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_API_KEY`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_TIMESTAMP`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_PASSPHRASE`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_SIGNATURE`\\n\\n**Relayer API Key auth headers:**\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY`\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS`\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /transactions\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-recent-transactions-for-a-user\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get current nonce for a user\",\"description\":\"Gets the current Proxy or Safe nonce for a user. Takes in the user's signer address and the type of nonce to retrieve.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /nonce\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-current-nonce-for-a-user\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get relayer address and nonce\",\"description\":\"Fetches the relayer address and nonce for a specific user. Takes in the user's signer address and the type of nonce to retrieve.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /relay-payload\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-relayer-address-and-nonce\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Check if a wallet is deployed\",\"description\":\"Returns whether the wallet at the given address is deployed onchain.\\n\\nUse the `type` query parameter to choose which wallet type to check:\\n\\n- Pass user's Polymarket `SAFE` address (default): Gnosis Safe (SignatureType `2`).\\n- Pass user's Polymarket `WALLET` Deposit Wallet address: Deposit Wallet (signatureType `3`). See the [Deposit Wallet Guide](/trading/deposit-wallets) for setup.\\n\\nOmitting `type` is equivalent to `type=SAFE`.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /deployed\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/check-if-a-wallet-is-deployed\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get all relayer API keys\",\"description\":\"Returns all relayer API keys for the authenticated address. Auth allowed: Gamma auth or Relayer API key auth (`RELAYER_API_KEY` + `RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS`).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /relayer/api/keys\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer-api-keys/get-all-relayer-api-keys\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Combos\",\"tag\":\"New\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get combo markets\",\"description\":\"Returns active markets that can be used as combo legs, ordered by volume\\ndescending. This endpoint is public and does not require CLOB\\nauthentication.\\n\\nEntries in `position_ids`, `outcomes`, and `outcome_prices` correspond by\\narray index (`[0]` is YES, `[1]` is NO). Use `next_cursor` unchanged in\\nthe next request; a value of `null` indicates the final page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/combos-rfq-openapi.yaml get /v1/rfq/combo-markets\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/combo-markets/get-combo-markets\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Submit a quote\",\"description\":\"Submit a signed maker quote for an active RFQ. Requires CLOB L2\\nauthentication for the maker role.\\n\\nREST does not assign a quote ID — generate `quote_id` client-side.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/combos-rfq-openapi.yaml post /v1/maker/quotes\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/maker/submit-a-quote\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Cancel a quote\",\"description\":\"Cancel an active maker quote before it is selected. Requires CLOB L2\\nauthentication for the maker role. `signer_address` and `maker_address`\\nmust match the authenticated identity.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/combos-rfq-openapi.yaml post /v1/maker/quotes/cancel\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/maker/cancel-a-quote\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Confirm or decline last look\",\"description\":\"Respond to a last-look confirmation request for a selected quote. Requires\\nCLOB L2 authentication for the maker role. `decision` must be `CONFIRM` or\\n`DECLINE`.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/combos-rfq-openapi.yaml post /v1/maker/confirmations\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/maker/confirm-or-decline-last-look\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get user combo positions\",\"description\":\"Combinatorial (multi-market) positions held by a user, with per-leg breakdown. Also available at /v1/data/user/{address}/positions/combos (address from the path). Open positions with shares_balance below 0.001 are omitted (dust floor — e.g. sub-0.001 remainders left by \\\"sell all\\\" cashouts); resolved positions are served regardless of balance.\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/data-openapi.yaml get /v1/positions/combos\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/core/get-user-combo-positions\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get user combo activity\",\"description\":\"Combo lifecycle and redeem events (split / merge / convert / compress / wrap / unwrap / redeem) for a user, with per-leg breakdown. Posting a new auto-cancel replaces the\\nprevious one.\\n\\nThe switch is one-shot: once the deadline elapses and your open orders are\\ncancelled, the schedule clears automatically. Orders you place after the\\nfire are not affected by the expired deadline — re-arm to extend\\nprotection.\\n\\nEach account may trigger auto-cancel at most 10 times per UTC day. Once\\nthat limit is reached, further attempts to arm a schedule are rejected with\\n`auto_cancel_daily_limit_reached` until the next UTC day; clearing an\\nexisting schedule (`time: 0`) is always allowed.\\n\\nUse `GET /v1/account/auto-cancel` to check the current deadline, today's\\ntrigger count, and when the daily counter resets.\\n\\nRequires proxy signature, see [proxy signing](/http/signing#2-proxy-signing).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json patch /v1/trade/auto-cancel\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/set-auto-cancel\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Update Leverage\",\"description\":\"Update leverage for an instrument.\\nRequires proxy signature, see [proxy signing](/http/signing#2-proxy-signing).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json patch /v1/trade/leverage\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/update-leverage\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Create Proxy\",\"description\":\"Create a new proxy to sign orders. signature, see [EOA signing](/http/signing#1-eoa-signing).\\n\\nThe `amount` field is the raw token amount including decimals (e.g. `\\\"100000000\\\"` for 100 USDC).\\nThis must match the `uint256 amount` value used in the EIP-712 `Withdraw` signature.\\n\\nThe `ts` field is Unix seconds (not milliseconds) because the on-chain contract validates it\\nagainst `block.timestamp`. It must also match the `uint64 ts` in the signed EIP-712 struct.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json post live\\nopen-order count; the rate-usage counters (`actions_per_minute`,\\n`actions_burst`, and `reset`) are not tracked here and are reported as 0.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/limits\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-account-limits\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Account Rewards\",\"description\":\"Get per-instrument daily liquidity reward shares for the authenticated account.\\nReward periods run from 12:00 UTC to 12:00 UTC and are labeled by their UTC end date.\\nOI rewards pay 6% APR on the account's full daily average gross OI across all\\ninstruments when the combined daily average gross OI of its rewards entity is\\nat least $1M. Accounts without an entity mapping qualify independently.\\nThe first reward period starts at 2026-05-08 12:00 UTC. If no date range is provided,\\nthe latest computed reward period is returned.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/rewards\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-account-rewards\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Instrument Config\",\"description\":\"Get per-instrument configuration (leverage and margin mode) for the authenticated account.\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/config\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-instrument-config\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Auto-Cancel Status\",\"description\":\"Get the current auto-cancel dead-man-switch status for the authenticated\\naccount, including the armed deadline, today's trigger count, and when\\nthe daily counter resets.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/auto-cancel\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-auto-cancel-status\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Create Account Invite\",\"description\":\"Create or return the authenticated account's primary invite code.
